notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Lars Nootbaar
notableEvents.detail: Bot 1 · Lars Nootbaar singles on a ground ball to shortstop Edwin Arroyo. Lars Nootbaar to 2nd. Lars Nootbaar advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Edwin Arroyo.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error vs Bryan Torres · Bot 1
notableEvents.detail: Reds challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Bryan Torres reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Sal Stewart, assist to second baseman Spencer Steer. Iván Herrera scores. Alec Burleson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Steer GIDP · Top 5
